Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to transform into event log

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to group events into cases

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Likely each document editing session is a case Document1 docx editing Quarterly Report docx editing Budget 2024 xlsx editing Email about Annual Meeting reply PDF review

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: But maybe combine related tasks The user edits Document1 docx case 1 then replies email case 2 then reviews PDF case 3 then edits Excel case 4 then updates Word doc again maybe same case as Document1 but it is separate

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Actually after closing Document1 and focusing Quarterly Report that is a new case

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can define cases by window title or by logical unit for example Document1 Editing Session includes focus at 09 00 00 until close at 09 07 00

Name: Validation - PE
Text: That includes typing save switch to Chrome etc

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Wait the user switched from Word to Chrome while still in same session They might be working on the same task of preparing the report but we can treat each distinct activity as separate case if they are independent

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Simpler approach Each distinct application window is a case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So DOC1 EDIT EMAIL REPLY PDF REVIEW EXCEL UPDATE DOC2 EDIT

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: But we also have switching back to Word for inserting reference that could be part of DOC1 EDIT or separate

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Might treat as part of DOC1 EDIT because it is same document

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 001 Editing Document1 docx Events focus at 09 00 Sequence until close at 09 07

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case002 Email Reply about Annual Meeting Events from switch to Chrome until send email inclusive

Name: Validation - PE
Text: After send email they switched to Acrobat so email reply ends before switch out

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case003 Review Report Draft pdf Events from switch to Acrobat until scroll highlight before next app change

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Define activity names mapping FOCUS to Open Focus TYPING to Edit SAVE to Save SWITCH not an activity but transition between cases CLICK Open Email to Open Email CLICK Reply to Reply Email Send Email to Send Email SCROLL maybe ignore or map as Scroll HIGHLIGHT to Highlight Text
